+----------+-----------------------------------+-------------+-------------+
| Modo     | Ruta                              | Costo total | Tipo        |
+==========+===================================+=============+=============+
| >> A pie | Origen -> Destino                 |        3.50 | Optima      |
|    A pie | -                                 |           - | Alternativa |
+----------+-----------------------------------+-------------+-------------+
| >> Bus   | Origen -> Destino                 |        3.50 | Optima      |
|    Bus   | -                                 |           - | Alternativa |
+----------+-----------------------------------+-------------+-------------+
| >> Carro | Origen -> Destino                 |        3.50 | Optima      |
|    Carro | -                                 |           - | Alternativa |
+----------+-----------------------------------+-------------+-------------+
